markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Lovable and GrowthX to discuss progress on SEO and content strategy initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has made significant progress on keyword research, identifying \~3,000 competitive page opportunities totaling \~120M monthly searches](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Lovable launching new cloud and AI offerings on Monday; hiring temporary product marketer to assist with messaging/positioning](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Current Lovable website structure is fragmented; opportunity to improve SEO and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Next steps: Prioritize comparison pages, refine content strategy, start content calibration, scope template library project](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)

## Topics

### Keyword Research and Content Strategy

  - [Analyzed \~200,000 keywords, narrowed to \~125,000 relevant ones](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Identified \~3,000 competitive page opportunities across 6 clusters: tools, templates, comparisons, how-to, what-is, listicles](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Total opportunity: \~120M monthly searches (US, desktop only)](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Prioritizing high-intent keywords, even if difficult, to establish early presence in category](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [Built AI workflows for research, drafting, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Generating comprehensive research briefs and initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Created workflow for on-brand graphics and infographics](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Developing assignment briefs for efficient content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)

### Website Structure and SEO

  - [Current Lovable site is fragmented across different platforms/subdomains](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [Competitors (Webflow, Base44) also struggling with indexing community/template pages](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve site structure and SEO, potentially following Canva's seamless logged-in/out experience](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)

### Templates and Community Content

  - [Exploring integration of community-created templates with curated, Lovable-approved templates](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Discussing potential remix functionality and API access with Sebastian](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Aiming to create discoverable, SEO-friendly template library](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

### Performance Measurement

  - [Need to establish baseline metrics using Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2608.0)
  - [Will create custom model for projecting page publishing rate, time to reach potential, conversion rates, and ROI](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2552.0)
  - [Importance of showing both short-term progress and long-term strategic value](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2599.0)

### Lovable Product Updates

  - [Launching new cloud and AI offerings on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Cloud offering: Seamless backend setup via Superbase](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [AI feature: Easy integration of LLM functionality without API keys](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prioritize development of competitor comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Refine and get feedback on overall content strategy and cluster prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Start content calibration process for one selected cluster](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Meet with Sebastian to align on templates project scope and integration](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
  - [Establish baseline SEO metrics and create performance projection model](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)
  - [GrowthX to send list of required access (GSC, CMS, GA) and materials (brand guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2608.0)
  - [Lovable to provide access to necessary tools and data for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/3GSs8NZ51sHJjjB5mBW6iJWJUQybxDyE?tab=summary&timestamp=2626.0)
